content: We can frame the entire iterative development process of cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems itself as an autonomous ICM-based curiosity-driven agent, where each new SOTA architecture is a new memory entry added to the broader ecosystem's working memory, selected for retention by the inherent curiosity of the AI research community. This reframing reorients SOTA benchmarking from a simple progress tracker to a gated memory selection mechanism that shapes long-term research direction.
